title: Solstice Festival: Main-Stage Slotting
strategies: next-fit slotting baseline: load the current stage until the next act exceeds capacity C or hits the K-act changeover cap, then open a new stage and never look back (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)
first-fit in booking order: place each act on the lowest-index stage with both resource room and a free changeover window, reusing earlier gaps but never reordering the lineup

cardinality-aware decreasing-order packing: slot the largest acts first via first-fit-decreasing / best-fit-decreasing respecting BOTH the capacity C and the per-stage K-act cap, so small acts top off partly-filled stages
seeded local search: start from a decreasing-order layout and relocate acts off the least-loaded stage (or perturb-and-reoptimize) to eliminate whole stages under both constraints
